title: EnvWatchEvent
description: Schema for a JSON watch event emitted by envdiff watch --format json

path.description: Absolute or relative path to the watched .env file

previous_hash.description: MD5 hash of the file before the change, or null on first detection

current_hash.description: MD5 hash of the file after the change

diff.description: Diff result between previous and current file state

added.description: Keys present in the new version but not the old

removed.description: Keys present in the old version but not the new

changed.description: Keys whose values changed between versions

unchanged.description: Keys with identical values in both versions
